verses.text: Israel' tate sung panin Reuben a tacil ahi hi. (Amah in a pa' zineute khat luppih ahih manin tacil hi napi-in ama innluahza pen Josef' tungah kipia hi. Tua ahih ciangin innluahza tawh kizui-in khangsimna-ah amah kiciamteh lo hi
A sanggamte lakah Judah a thahat suakin ama sung panin ulian khat a om hangin innluahza pen Josef-a' ahi hi
Israel' tacil Reuben' tapate: Hanok, Pallu, Hezron, leh Karmi ahi uh hi
Joel' suante: A tapa Shemaiah, a tapa Gog, a tapa Shimei
a tapa Mikah, a tapa Reaiah, a tapa Baal
leh a tapa Beerah hi a, Assiria kumpipa Tilgathpileser in amau' minam makai Beerah manin salin a puakkhiatpa ahi hi. Amah pen Reuben mite a ukpipa ahi hi
Tua ciangin amau' khangsimna a kiciamteh ciangin a innkuankuanin ama behte: Ukpi Jeiel, Zekhariah
leh Joel mite beh sung panin Shema' tapa Azaz, a tapa Bela ahi hi. Aroer leh tua panin Nebo leh Baalmeon ciangdongah a teng uh hi
Gilead gamsungah amau' bawngte khangin tampi pha ahih manin Eufratis gun hih lampang sehnel gam lutna ciangdong nisuahna lamah zong a teng uh hi
Tua ciangin Saul' hun lai-in amaute in Hagri mite simin zo uh a, Gilead nisuahna lam gam khempeuh-a amau' puanbukte luahin tuate sungah a teng uh hi.
Bashan gam Salekah dongah Reuben-te' galkhatah a teng Gad minamte
Ukpi Joel hi-in, a zom Shafam hi a, Janai leh Shafat, Bashan-ah beh makai ahi uh hi
Tua ciangin amau' beh makai dangte: Mikhael, Meshullam, Sheba, Jorai, Jakan, Zia, leh Eber, sagih pha uh hi
Hihte pen Buz' tapa Jahdo, a tapa Jeshishai, a tapa Mikhael, a tapa Gilead, a tapa Jaroah, a tapa Huri' tapa Abihail' suante ahi uh hi
Guni' tapa Abdiel' tapa Ahi pen amau' behte sungah ukpi ahi hi
Amaute Gilead gamsung, Bashan gam leh a khuapite sung, leh Sharon gamsung lonona a kiten' theihna ciangdongah a teng uh hi
Hihte khempeuh Judah kumpi Jotham' hun sung, leh Israel kumpi Jeroboam' hun sungin khangsimna-ah kiciamteh hi.

sections.sectionTitle: Minam Nih leh Minam Langte' Tangthu

verses.text: Reuben mite, Gad mite, leh Manasseh minam a langte in mi thahat, lum leh namsau kuahin thal a tawi, gal a siam, nasem dingin a baihsa-in a om mi tul sawmli leh tul li leh za sagih leh sawmguk nei hi
Amaute in Hagri mite, Jetur mite, Nafish mite, leh Nodab mite zo uh hi

Amaute a simna dingin huhna a ngah uh ciangin Hagri mite leh amau tawh a kipawl khempeuhte amaute' khutsungah kipia hi; bang hang hiam cih leh gal kidona sungah amaute in Pasian' tungah ko uh a, amaute in Pasian muang uh ahih manin amah in amaute' thumna a pia hi
Amaute in amau' ganhingte matsak uh hi. A kalaoh uh tul sawmnga, tuu tul za nih leh tul sawmnga, la tul nih, leh mi tul za khat hingmat uh hi
Tua gal pen Pasian' gal ahih manin mi tampi tak kithatin puk hi. Tua ciangin amaute sal a suah hun dong uh tua munah teng uh hi
Manasseh minam a langte pen Bashan panin Baalhermon, Senir, leh Hermon Mual tungah tengin tam pha mahmah uh hi
Amau' beh lutangte: Efer, Ishi, Eliel, Azriel, Jeremiah, Hodaviah, leh Jahdiel hi a, a thahat galhangte, mi minthangte, a beh lutangte ahi uh hi
Ahih hangin amaute in a pate uh Pasian' thu palsat uh a, Pasian in amaute' mai-ah a suksiat tua gam mite' pasian-te bia uh hi

Tua ahih ciangin Israel Pasian in Assiria kumpipa Pul (Tilgathpileser zong a kici) Assiria kumpipa hansuah a, amah in Reuben mite, Gad mite, leh Manasseh minam alangte puakhia-in, Halah, Habor, Hara khuate, leh Gozan gun dungah paipihin tuni dongin tua gamte-ah om uh hi.
